lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man kee saar na jaananee haumai bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: They do not know the state of their own minds; they are deluded by doubt and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਭਉ ਪਇਆ ਵਡਭਾਗਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee bhau peaa vaddabhaag vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Fear of God is obtained; by great good fortune, the Lord comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach rate se niramale jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with Truth are immaculate; their light merges in the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਪਇਐ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਹੋਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai peiai man vas hoaa haumai sabad jalaae |
lines.english: When the Fear of God comes, the mind is restrained, and through the Word of the Shabad, the ego is burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai naau paaeaa naanak sukh samaae |2|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, one obtains the Name; O Nanak, he is absorbed in peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਭੂਪਤਿ ਰਾਣੇ ਰੰਗ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਸੁਹਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: eeh bhoopat raane rang din chaar suhaavanaa |
lines.english: The pleasures of kings and emperors are pleasing, but they last for only a few days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ehu maaeaa rang kasunbh khin meh leh jaavanaa |
lines.english: These pleasures of Maya are like the color of the safflower, which wears off in a moment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਪਾਪ ਲੈ ਜਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa naal na chalai sir paap lai jaavanaa |
lines.english: They do not go with him when he departs; instead, he carries the load of sins upon his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਪਕੜਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ਕਾਲਿ ਤਾਂ ਖਰਾ ਡਰਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaan pakarr chalaaeaa kaal taan kharaa ddaraavanaa |
lines.english: When death seizes him, and marches him away, then he looks absolutely hideous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਣਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: oeh velaa hath na aavai fir pachhutaavanaa |6|
lines.english: That lost opportunity will not come into his hands again, and in the end, he regrets and repents. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੀ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਤੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir milan na paaeinee jameh tai mar jaeh |
lines.english: Again and again, they are born only to die; they cannot meet their Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਮੁਹ ਫਿਰੇ ਸੇ ਬਧੇ ਦੁਖ ਸਹਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te jo muh fire se badhe dukh sahaeh |
lines.english: Those who turn their faces away from the True Guru, suffer in sorrow and bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੇਹਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree bakhas lehi sabade mel milaeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the Gracious Lord forgives, then one is united in Union with the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਈ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਖ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahasaa rog na chhoddee dukh hee meh dukh paeh |
lines.english: The disease of doubt does not depart, and they find only pain and more pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮੁਹ ਫਿਰੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo satigur te muh fire tinaa tthaur na tthaau |
lines.english: Those who turn their faces away from the True Guru, shall find no place of rest or shelter.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਛੁਟੜਿ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਦੁਹਚਾਰਣਿ ਬਦਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jiau chhuttarr ghar ghar firai duhachaaran badanaau |
lines.english: They wander around from door to door, like a woman forsaken, with a bad character and a bad reputation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਖਸੀਅਹਿ ਸੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh bakhaseeeh se satigur mel milaau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are forgiven, and united in Union with the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਤਿ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ਸੇ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਰਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo seveh sat muraar se bhavajal tar geaa |
lines.english: Those who serve the True Lord, the Destroyer of ego, cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ਤਿਨ ਜਮੁ ਛਡਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo boleh har har naau tin jam chhadd geaa |
lines.english: Those who chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, are passed over by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਲਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: se daragah paidhe jaeh jinaa har jap leaa |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Lord, go to His Court in robes of honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨਿਤ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭਉ ਗਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gun gaavaa piaare nit guramukh bhram bhau geaa |7|
lines.english: I sing continually Your Glorious Praises, O Beloved; as Gurmukh, my doubts and fears have been dispelled. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸੇਈ ਪੁਰਖ ਜਿਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਮਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har seveh seee purakh jinaa har tudh meaa |
lines.english: They alone serve You, O Lord, whom You bless with Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਲੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਤੈ ਵਸਤੂ ਪਈਓ ਹਰਿ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: thaalai vich tai vasatoo peeo har bhojan amrit saar |
lines.english: Upon the plate, three things have been placed; this is the sublime, ambrosial food of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਅਲਭੁ ਹੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਲਭੈ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu bhojan alabh hai santahu labhai gur veechaar |
lines.english: It is so difficult to obtain this food, O Saints; it is obtained only by contemplating the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ਪਾਈਐ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit khaadhai man tripateeai paaeeai mokh duaar |
lines.english: Eating this, the mind is satisfied, and the Door of Salvation is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਮੁਦਾਵਣੀ ਕਿਉ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਕਢੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਰਖੀਐ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eeh mudaavanee kiau vichahu kadteeai sadaa rakheeai ur dhaar |
lines.english: Why should we cast this riddle out of our minds? We should keep it ever enshrined in our hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਮੁਦਾਵਣੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਰਸਿਖਾ ਲਧੀ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: eeh mudaavanee satiguroo paaee gurasikhaa ladhee bhaal |
lines.english: The True Guru has posed this riddle. The Guru's Sikhs have found its solution.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur mele se mil rahe satigur siau chit laae |
lines.english: Those whom the Primal Lord unites, remain in Union with Him; they focus their consciousness on the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੁ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਘਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bujhaae su bujhasee har paaeaa guramukh ghaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone understands this, whom the Lord inspires to understand. The Gurmukhs work hard, and find the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਵਿਛੋੜੇਨੁ ਸੇ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap vichhorren se vichhurre doojai bhaae khuaae |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord Himself separates, remain separated; in the love of duality, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vin karamaa kiaa paaeeai poorab likhiaa kamaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without good karma, what can anyone obtain? He earns what he is pre-destined to receive. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹਿ ਸਖੀਆ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗਾਵਣਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: beh sakheea jas gaaveh gaavanahaareea |
lines.english: Sitting together, the companions sing the Songs of the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ਤਿਨਾ ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sun maniaa har naau tinaa hau vaareea |
lines.english: Those who hear, and believe in the Lord's Name, to them I am a sacrifice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਕਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam salaahihu nit har kau balihaareea |
lines.english: They praise the Lord's Name continually; they are a sacrifice to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਵਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਦੇਖਣਹਾਰੀਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: hau bal jaavaa din raat gur dekhanahaareea |8|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who, day and night, behold their Guru. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੁ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਹਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukheea har mel milaavanahaareea |
lines.english: O Lord, let me unite with the Gurmukhs, who are united with You.
